description: The commandmate CLI subcommands and options the cmate-orchestrate runners are allowed to use, transcribed verbatim from `commandmate <cmd> --help` (CommandMate 0.12.0). The fake CLI enforces this surface and the contract-parity test asserts the runners only ever call subcommands/flags listed here — so a runner that reaches for a non-existent flag (the #1467 regression) fails the suite instead of only failing in production. When a real `commandmate` binary is on PATH the parity test additionally checks these flags are a subset of the live `--help`.
